title: ophrys holosericea subsp. candica
intro: Ophrys holosericea subsp. candica is a rare and endemic orchid species found in the Balkan Peninsula, particularly in Greece and Albania. The plant's rhizome and roots have been traditionally used in folk medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Ophrys holosericea subsp. candica are believed to include the reduction of fever, relief from respiratory issues, and the treatment of wounds and skin conditions. However, due to the lack of scientific research, there is limited information available on herbal preparations for this plant, and its use should be approached with caution.
